_comment: Layout manifest — the SINGLE source of truth for layouts. The server (api.py) DERIVES each layout's route as /<id> (route is NOT a manifest field; the title is display-only and does not affect the route) and serves its HTML/JS/CSS; the chooser builds its cards from this (the server injects the derived route, or the chooser falls back to /<id> when served raw). Add a layout here and it surfaces in BOTH the chooser and the routes. id must be URL-safe. kind: function-mapped | generic | placeholder.

layouts.name: Bring your own
layouts.description: Build a layout for your own toy — and share it.
